claims.statement: Endolift facial has a public starting tariff of 798.60 EUR for the ojeras zone.
Endolift papada or mandibular definition has a public PVP of 1064.80 EUR per zone.
The canonical site dataset identifies Chamberi as CS20144 and Salamanca-Goya as CS20073.
Endolift uses an optical microfibre of 200 to 300 microns in the protocols described on the site.
claims.source_required: Current manufacturer IFU or official technical documentation identifying the fibre range used by NUVANX.

claims.statement: Visible inflammation, tightness or mild bruising commonly lasts 3 to 7 days after Endolift.
claims.source_required: Approved NUVANX clinical protocol plus primary device or peer-reviewed evidence.

claims.statement: Visible recovery after fractional CO2 laser is commonly 4 to 7 days depending on protocol depth.
claims.source_required: Approved NUVANX CO2 protocol and primary clinical evidence stratified by treatment depth.

claims.statement: DEKA Motus AZ+, fractional CO2 and EXION BTL platforms used by NUVANX have current CE marking for the communicated medical uses.
claims.source_required: Current declarations of conformity, device model identifiers and intended-use documentation for equipment installed at each clinic.

claims.statement: EXION Fractional RF may be considered as an alternative within fractional microneedling radiofrequency according to diagnosis.
claims.source_required: Primary technical comparison and medical sign-off defining comparable indications without superiority language.

claims.statement: EXION BTL Face, Body and Fractional RF use different energy delivery modes and require modality-specific parameters and recovery guidance.
claims.source_required: Current BTL technical documentation and IFU for each installed EXION applicator, including intended use and parameter limits.

claims.statement: BTL EXILITE IPL may be selected for pigmentary, vascular and skin-quality indications after diagnosis and phototype assessment.
claims.source_required: Current EXILITE IFU, installed filter inventory and approved NUVANX protocol defining eligible indications and exclusions.

claims.statement: Dr. Jose Javier Rivera Tejeda belongs to named scientific societies relevant to the services communicated by NUVANX.
claims.source_required: Names of the societies, current membership proof and authorization to publish.

claims.reason: Absolute ranking is not supported by an approved claim file and can misrepresent comparative evidence.
Implies final or universally sufficient treatment.
Comparative superiority is not supported by an approved head-to-head evidence record.
Exaggerated magnitude language is not quantified or patient-specific.

claims.statement: forma indolora|sin tiempos de baja|sin downtime significativo
claims.reason: Pain and recovery vary by patient, parameters and procedure.

claims.statement: Miembro de las principales sociedades científicas
claims.reason: The organizations and current memberships must be named and verified.
